name: Pine
absorption_note: Wine-equivalent for Phenotype — Windows and cross-platform application compatibility layer. Target: substrate monorepo as crates/pine. Fits substrate sandbox/compat theme (alongside nanovms Firecracker, WASM isolation). Per ADR-ECO-008 compat layer policy.
note: Audited 2026-07-17; Windows/cross-platform compat layer; large scope — needs deeper audit before absorption.
